mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM users
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = #{username} OR email = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password, enabled, created_by, created_date, updated_by, updated_date, password_reset_required) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{password}, #{enabled}, #{createdBy}, #{createdDate}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedDate}, #{passwordResetRequired})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, email = #{email}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_date = #{updatedDate}, password_reset_required = #{passwordResetRequired} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_roles (user_id, role_id, created_by, created_date, updated_by, updated_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, #{createdBy}, #{createdDate}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedDate})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role_id = #{roleId}
